content.text: In the village of Mamma, in Katsushika District of the province of Shimōsa, there lived a man named Katsushirō.

His family had lived in the village since his grandfather’s generation. They owned many fields and lived prosperously. But Katsushirō was carefree and unconcerned by nature. He regarded farming as troublesome, and in the end he fell into poverty.
